title: Add CitationAcceptance struct and CitationAcceptances field to materialize state + engine apply case
definition_of_done: CitationAcceptance struct in state.go; CitationAcceptances []CitationAcceptance field on Issue; applyCitationAccepted method in engine; TestApplyCitationAccepted and TestApplyCitationAccepted_UnknownIssue_NoError pass; make check green
outcome: Added CitationAcceptance struct to state.go, CitationAcceptances field on Issue, applyCitationAccepted method in engine.go; TestApplyCitationAccepted and UnknownIssue_NoError pass; make check green

notes.msg: Implemented CitationAcceptance struct in state.go, added CitationAcceptances []CitationAcceptance field to Issue, added applyCitationAccepted method in engine.go with OpCitationAccepted case, and TestApplyCitationAccepted + TestApplyCitationAccepted_UnknownIssue_NoError tests. make check green (lint 0 issues, all tests pass, 100% test efficacy, 85.84% mutator coverage).
